envVars.name: SIMMER_API_KEY
envVars.description: Your Simmer SDK API key (from agent registration).

envVars.name: OWS_WALLET
envVars.description: OWS wallet name. Set only if you chose Path A (OWS).

envVars.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
envVars.description: Polygon EVM private key. Set only if you chose Path B (external raw key).
